title: Triplewax Bumper Shine 500 ml – Restores & Protects Faded Plastic & Rubber Trim (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
UV FADE PROTECTION: Triplewax Bumper Shine creates a protective layer that effectively prevents UV fade on treated surfaces, ensuring long-lasting color vibrancy

WATER AND DIRT RESISTANCE: This bumper shine offers high resistance to water and dirt, effectively locking in a durable shine on unpainted plastic bumpers, PVC trim, tyre walls, side mirrors, and spoiler kits
STREAK-FREE FINISH: The easy-to-use formula ensures a simple application process and leaves a streak-free finish, enhancing the overall appearance of your vehicle's exterior

VERSATILE APPLICATION: Suitable for use on all colors of unpainted plastic bumpers, PVC trim, tyre walls, side mirrors, and spoiler kits, providing a 'new look' shine across a range of exterior PVC surfaces

ANTI-STATIC CLEANING TECHNOLOGY: Featuring advanced anti-static cleaning technology, this product actively fights against the build-up of dirt, grease, and grime, keeping surfaces cleaner for a longer time
